title: RuneScape: Castlewars on Mario Paint Composer
description:
MP3 here courtesy of  payau123:
http://370b9fd0.linkbucks.com

Day 1
#17 - Most Discussed (Today) - Music
#79 - Most Viewed (Today) - Music - Canada
Day 2
#16 - Most Discussed (Today) - Music
#72 - Most Viewed (Today) - Music - Canada
#79 - Top Rated (Today) - Music
Oct. 25
#91 - Most Discussed (This Week) - Music
Oct 26
#87 - Most Discussed (This Week) - Music
Wow. Simply asking "What's the name of this song" really turned up a lot of comments. XD

EDIT! Oct. 26

Ok you all win. And I do mean you ALL win. So many people answered this correctly that there's no way I can list you all in the video (this video in 1 hour got more comments than some of my videos that have been out for months!). I guess that means I did a good job recreating it at least. The first one to identify the song, hobokiller1, will be the only one mentioned in the video.

And before anyone asks, I do not currently play RuneScape but you can add my account, Axelrod777, with the hopes that you'll catch me on one of the few days that I log on for nostalgia. I'm level 95 without summoning, 99 with.

Original Description:

I started this song a long while ago but wasn't really able to capute its essence for a few reasons. Now, with the help of Cat333pokemon's real soundfont I do this song. Which song you ask? That's where you come in.

I started this song and soon realised "Wow this video is so random. I don't think anyone is going to look at this or recognise it." Now it's up to you to prove me wrong! In your comment please guess where this song comes from whether you know it or not. Since so many people got it right I will list the first few people who got it right instead when I decide to update the title.
